2026-03-21.patch_summary: This patch refactors the memory hotplug API to add a new interface that allows drivers to select their preferred online type (ZONE_NORMAL vs ZONE_MOVABLE) when adding memory. The CXL driver, which uses the dax kmem driver, requires this feature. A new helper function __add_memory_driver_managed is added, which accepts an explicit online_type argument and validates it. Existing APIs are modified to use the new helpers, but no functional changes are made for existing users.
